title: Digitacalia napeifolia

This plant belongs to the tribe Senecioneae, which includes many species of daisies and thistles. The classification of Digitacalia napeifolia into its specific taxonomic ranks is as follows: kingdom Plantae, clade Angiosperms, clade Eudicots, clade Asterids, order Asterales, family Asteraceae, subfamily Cichorioideae, tribe Senecioneae, genus Digitacalia, species D. napeifolia.
